title: rumex carpaticus
intro: Rumex carpaticus, also known as Carpathian dock, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Rumex carpaticus include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the treatment of kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being employed in traditional medicine to create tinctures and salves.
